# GitHub Labels Configuration

Create these labels in the repository to support the feedback system. The AI agent and issue templates depend on these labels for categorization and pattern detection.

## Feedback Type Labels

| Label | Color | Description |
|-------|-------|-------------|
| `feedback` | `#0e8a16` | Content feedback from learners |
| `suggestion` | `#1d76db` | New exercise or content proposals |
| `industry-variant` | `#5319e7` | Industry-specific adaptations |
| `bug` | `#d73a4a` | Errors, broken links, incorrect info |

## Content Area Labels

| Label | Color | Description |
|-------|-------|-------------|
| `content` | `#c5def5` | General content changes |
| `level:beginner` | `#bfd4f2` | Beginner level content |
| `level:capable` | `#bfd4f2` | Capable level content |
| `level:proficient` | `#bfd4f2` | Proficient level content |
| `level:expert` | `#bfd4f2` | Expert level content |
| `capstone` | `#d4c5f9` | Capstone project content |
| `guidelines` | `#fbca04` | Safety & compliance guidelines |
| `measurement` | `#f9d0c4` | Measurement & fluency slope |

## Agent Action Labels

| Label | Color | Description |
|-------|-------|-------------|
| `agent:review` | `#e4e669` | Queued for AI agent review |
| `agent:drafted` | `#0075ca` | Agent has drafted a response/PR |
| `agent:approved` | `#0e8a16` | Agent draft approved by maintainer |
| `low-rating` | `#d93f0b` | Content rated 2/5 or below — needs attention |
| `pattern-detected` | `#c2e0c6` | Multiple feedback entries show same issue |

## Priority Labels

| Label | Color | Description |
|-------|-------|-------------|
| `priority:high` | `#b60205` | Blocking or misleading content |
| `priority:medium` | `#fbca04` | Should fix in next review cycle |
| `priority:low` | `#0e8a16` | Nice to have, not urgent |
